recommended_lenses.rationale: The spike's whole value is a trustworthy COMPATIBLE/INCOMPATIBLE verdict; review found three independent channels (route-set shrink, manifest self-reference, fail-open aggregation) by which implementation can emit COMPATIBLE without earning it.
focus_areas: route set committed inside the probe manifest and covered by set equality with (probeID, route) composite keys
test-suite hard-coded manifest digest asserted against the manifest file and every evidence report
aggregator derives its expected report set from the manifest, never from reports found on disk
deletion and route-deletion tests actually fail when an entry or route is removed
recommended_lenses.severity_guidance: CRITICAL: any path where a probe/route/report can be absent while COMPATIBLE is still emitted. HIGH: equality performed on non-composite keys or against runtime-declared sets. MEDIUM: aggregation semantics present but unowned/undocumented.
recommended_lenses.source_finding_summary: Route-set self-shrink and self-referential manifest allow a rule-abiding COMPATIBLE that never loads DafnyPipeline

recommended_lenses.rationale: INV-003's mechanism is defeatable by installing z3 at the assembly-adjacent discovery path (which the research brief recommends), stale sentinel recordings, and PROVER_PATH; evidence would then prove digest identity while the option-wiring Phase 0.1 relies on is unproven.
focus_areas: provisioned z3 location is outside every ambient discovery location; pre-assert no other z3 executable under route output trees
decoy test: differently-hashed z3 planted at the assembly-adjacent path, executed solver still the pinned one
removal test asserts P06/P07 individually record solver-unavailable failure, per route
sentinel recording carries a per-run nonce; PROVER_PATH sanitized
recommended_lenses.severity_guidance: CRITICAL: verification succeeds with the pinned z3 removed or a decoy present. HIGH: removal test passes only via P04's identity failure (wrong-reason pass). MEDIUM: sentinel evidence without run-uniqueness.
recommended_lenses.source_finding_summary: Assembly-adjacent same-file collision plus weak removal-test oracle defeat executed-solver identity

recommended_lenses.rationale: Four invariants assert facts (solver invoked, no solver launch, options actually consumed, SDK that built) with no named typed observation channel while PRH-004 bans console scraping — the exact spot implementations quietly regress to stdout regexes or proxy inference.
focus_areas: solver observation defined as typed solver-produced outcome enums plus removal negative, never text scraping
P08/P09 frontend probes run against the recording sentinel to make no-solver-launch observable
options manifest read back post-verification with a normalization canary that defeats input echo
P02 build-SDK recorded at build time via allowlisted launcher; invocation cwd/global.json location pinned
recommended_lenses.severity_guidance: CRITICAL: any classification/count sourced from console text or regex over tool output. HIGH: invariant satisfied by proxy inference the spec never blessed. MEDIUM: observation channel used but undocumented in evidence.
recommended_lenses.source_finding_summary: Undefined observation channels invite PRH-004 violations or silent invariant weakening

recommended_lenses.rationale: The committed-sample equality test is self-contradictory (commit-id bootstrap paradox) until the deterministic projection is partitioned; implementers will otherwise weaken the projection silently, deleting the reproducibility anchor.
focus_areas: three-way field partition (binding identity / deterministic projection / volatile) lives in a committed schema file with digest in the report
equality test derives its comparison set from the schema file, not from code constants
commit id asserted equal to HEAD at generation time by a separate check, excluded from cross-run equality
sample-equality test scoped to the pinned RID with loud skip elsewhere; atomic report emission
recommended_lenses.severity_guidance: CRITICAL: equality test that cannot pass as implemented, or projection shrunk in code without a schema-file diff. HIGH: binding fields silently dropped from evidence. MEDIUM: volatile classification changes without spec change.
recommended_lenses.source_finding_summary: Deterministic projection undefined and self-contradictory; committed-sample equality permanently red as written

recommended_lenses.rationale: Expected-value sidecars generated by freezing the harness's first run self-certify first-run bugs; the resolver-inference fixture requirement has no independent enforcement, so the subtlest recovery claim can silently go unexercised.
focus_areas: shape tests on sidecars independent of fixture equality (per-form rows, inferred-ghost row with no ghost keyword, exactly one expect row)
AST-based fixture-hygiene test for ok.dfy structural purity
sidecar provenance documented (how generated, how reviewed)
expected-loaded-assembly sidecar per route asserted as set equality in P03
recommended_lenses.severity_guidance: CRITICAL: a required fixture feature (inferred ghost, expect contrast) absent while all tests pass. HIGH: sidecar regenerated to green without review trail. MEDIUM: sidecar shape asserted but provenance undocumented.
recommended_lenses.source_finding_summary: Frozen-first-run sidecars self-certify recovery bugs; fixture-inventory requirements unenforced

recommended_lenses.rationale: The verdict taxonomy conflates harness bugs with reproduced integration failures (false INCOMPATIBLE triggers the expensive architecture fallback), and the operator surface (run procedure, exit codes, atomic reports, artifact lifecycle in a public repo) is unspecified.
focus_areas: verdict taxonomy: INCOMPLETE for environment faults, INCOMPATIBLE-candidate with net8.0 control experiment before boundary rejection
distinct exit codes for COMPATIBLE/INCOMPATIBLE/INCOMPLETE/crashed; malformed report is its own state
untracked out/ directory plus gitignore so z3 binaries and package caches never land in the public repo
terminal verdict summary per route and ADR evidence citations as repo-relative paths
recommended_lenses.severity_guidance: CRITICAL: harness API misuse citable as a reproduced integration failure in ADR-0001. HIGH: truncated/absent report readable as pass or refutation. MEDIUM: missing run docs, summaries, or lifecycle rules.
recommended_lenses.source_finding_summary: INCOMPATIBLE conflates harness bug, environment fault, and reproduced integration failure
